title: Implement jmap-chat-egui: egui/eframe GUI client
description: Build a cross-platform native GUI JMAP Chat client using egui (eframe). The GUI must connect to a JMAP server using the jmap-chat library crate, display a chat list sidebar, message thread view, and compose bar. Real-time updates via SSE should flow through an mpsc channel from a Tokio background task into the egui render loop. Auth, server URL, and account ID are provided via CLI flags matching the pattern established by the jmap-chat library.
